headline: Private rooms open by role.
summary: Lux Veritas portal access begins with screened paths for members, artists, creators, press, partners, investors, and approved operators.
notice: No account, payment, entitlement, or private room is activated from this public shell.

rooms.label: Member
rooms.title: Members
rooms.body: Early access, private drops, listening rooms, presales, community moments, and selected merch.

rooms.label: Artist
rooms.title: Artists
rooms.body: Submission review, release consideration, artist-world fit, and future collaboration paths.

rooms.label: Creator
rooms.title: Creators
rooms.body: Story, visual, Codex, worldbuilding, and participation review for approved collaborators.

rooms.label: Press
rooms.title: Press
rooms.body: Institutional contact, selected boilerplate, media requests, and approved kit access.

rooms.label: Partner
rooms.title: Partners
rooms.body: Licensing, venues, studios, brand conversations, distribution, and strategic alignment.

rooms.label: Investor
rooms.title: Strategic Access
rooms.body: Screened investor, studio, and strategic partner access for approved conversations.

rooms.label: Operator
rooms.title: Operator Room
rooms.body: Reserved for approved operators. Access opens only through the private reporting path.
